The Court ordered the matter off calendar.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Will Doyle specially appearing for Rowena Navia for (successor trustee) Paula Bibbs.

The Court stated that it needs the 6th accounting. Mr. Doyle reported that Ms. Bibbs computer was hacked, that it took significant time to unfreeze the files and that they need a two week continuance. The status on filing an accounting was continued to August 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Saephan (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Rowena Navia for (trustee) Paula Bibbs.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that she has no information on the status, that it is not her case, that she tried to reach Ms. Navia for information and asked for a continuance. The status on filing an accounting was continued to August 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
